"'''Loyalties'''" is a role-playing game article written by [[James L. Cambias]]. It was published in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 4|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 4]] and presents the scenario for the [[Mission to Graleca]].

==Plot summary==
{{Plot|adventure}}
